{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.2": 3, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The rewrite clarifies the contribution and addresses internal contradictions in the original text.",
    "R1.2": "The rewrite identifies some inconsistencies but doesn't fully walk the argument chain or propose minimal repairs for all issues.",
    "RX.1": "The rewrite acknowledges uncertainty about the decomposition of performance gains, but doesn't explicitly mark confidence levels for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The rewrite accurately reflects the scope of the changes made to the artifact.",
    "RX.4": "The rewrite does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The rewrite lacks detailed provenance and traceability annotations for the changes made."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.9, "R1.2": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.6, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The rewrite clarifies the contribution and addresses internal contradictions in the original text.
rationale.R1.2: The rewrite identifies some inconsistencies but doesn't fully walk the argument chain or propose minimal repairs for all issues.
rationale.RX.1: The rewrite acknowledges uncertainty about the decomposition of performance gains, but doesn't explicitly mark confidence levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The rewrite accurately reflects the scope of the changes made to the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The rewrite does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The rewrite lacks detailed provenance and traceability annotations for the changes made.
